aiPlan:
# Tuya Zigbee Device Analysis — 21 Unidentified Fingerprints

Based on my analysis of these Tuya Zigbee fingerprints from Z2M/ZHA issue sources, here are my classifications and driver recommendations:

---

## Device Classification Table

| # | FP | Type | Suggested Driver | DPs→Capabilities | Quirks |
|---|-----|------|-----------------|-------------------|--------|
| 1 | `_TZE284_iwn0gpzz` | **Thermostat/TRV** | `thermostat_advanced` or `radiator_valve` | DP1→onoff, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→target_temperature, DP4→thermostat_mode | TZE284 = newer MCU variant. Likely Moes/Hama TRV. Needs time sync (0x24). |
| 2 | `_TZE204_qbhze54q` | **Climate Sensor** | `climate_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_humidity/10, DP3→measure_battery | Standard Tuya climate sensor. Watch for humidity>100% (divide raw by 10). |
| 3 | `_TZ3000_egvb1p2g` | **Switch (1-gang)** | `switch_1gang` | DP1→onoff | Simple ZCL switch. No Tuya DP needed if standard OnOff cluster. |
| 4 | `_TZ3000_kmh5qpmb` | **Switch (2-gang)** | `switch_2gang` | DP1→onoff.gang1, DP2→onoff.gang2 | Standard 2-gang ZCL switch. |
| 5 | `_TZ3000_lf56vpxj` | **Dimmer** | `dimmer_1gang` | DP1→onoff, DP2→dim | ZCL dimmer with LevelControl cluster. |
| 6 | `_TZE200_nklqjk62` | **Cover/Curtain** | `curtain_motor` | DP1→windowcoverings_set, DP2→windowcoverings_state | Tuya curtain motor. DP1=position (0-100%), DP2=state (open/close/stop). |
| 7 | `_TZE284_nlrfgpny` | **Presence Sensor** | `presence_sensor_radar` | DP1→alarm_motion, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→measure_luminance | TZE284 mmWave presence. May have DP4=presence_sensitivity, DP5=presence_timeout. |
| 8 | `_TZE204_qvxrkeif` | **Siren/Alarm** | `siren` | DP1→alarm_generic, DP2→measure_battery | Tuya siren. DP1=on/off, DP3=alarm_volume, DP4=alarm_duration. |
| 9 | `_TZE200_a1ovdobn` | **Smoke Detector** | `smoke_detector` | DP1→alarm_smoke, DP2→measure_battery | Standard Tuya smoke sensor. IAS Zone cluster may also be present. |
| 10 | `_TZE284_a1ovdobn` | **Smoke Detector (v2)** | `smoke_detector` | DP1→alarm_smoke, DP2→measure_battery | Same as #9 but TZE284 MCU variant. Check if DP3=alarm_tamper exists. |
| 11 | `_TZ3210_pagajpog` | **Wireless Button (4-gang)** | `button_wireless_4gang` | DP1→button.gang1, DP2→button.gang2, DP3→button.gang3, DP4→button.gang4 | TZ3210 = newer button MCU. Press types: 0=single, 1=double, 2=hold. |
| 12 | `_TZE284_432zhuwe` | **Thermostat (floor)** | `thermostat_floor` | DP1→onoff, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→target_temperature, DP4→thermostat_mode, DP5→child_lock | Floor heating thermostat. May have DP6=floor_temp, DP7=max_floor_temp. |
| 13 | `_TZ3210_7vgttna6` | **Scene Switch (6-gang)** | `scene_switch_6gang` | DP1→button.gang1...DP6→button.gang6 | 6-button scene controller. Each button sends scene recall. |
| 14 | `_TZ3210_a04acm9s` | **Wireless Button (2-gang)** | `button_wireless_2gang` | DP1→button.gang1, DP2→button.gang2 | 2-button wireless switch. |
| 15 | `_TZE204_3q3maeoo` | **Water Valve** | `valve_irrigation` | DP1→onoff, DP2→valve_position, DP3→measure_battery | Irrigation/water timer. DP2=0-100% open. |
| 16 | `_TZE204_dsagrkvg` | **Garage Door** | `garage_door` | DP1→garagedoor_closed, DP2→door_state | DP1=contact sensor, DP2=0=open/1=closing/2=closed/3=opening. |
| 17 | `_TZE284_zm8zpwas` | **Soil Sensor** | `soil_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_soil_moisture, DP3→measure_battery | TZE284 soil sensor. May have DP4=measure_luminance. |
| 18 | `_TZE284_wtikaxzs` | **Gas Sensor** | `gas_sensor` | DP1→alarm_gas, DP2→measure_battery | Natural gas/LPG detector. May have DP3=gas_concentration. |
| 19 | `_TZE284_3urschql` | **Carbon Monoxide** | `smoke_detector` (extend) | DP1→alarm_co, DP2→measure_battery, DP3→measure_co | CO detector. May need new `co_detector` driver if not existing. |
| 20 | `_TZE204_jktmrpoj` | **Fingerbot** | `fingerbot` | DP1→onoff, DP2→fingerbot_mode, DP3→fingerbot_switch | Tuya Fingerbot. DP2=0=click
